"useTableSelection", "useDebounce"], "default": "DataTable"}, "complexity_notes": "Module provides a generic, production-grade data table with several non-trivial concerns: (1) Async data fetching with AbortController cancellation, stale-closure guard via `ok` flag, and DOMException AbortError filtering; (2) Debounced filter propagation (default 300ms) via useDebounce hook; (3) Generic sorting with custom column sortFn override or fallback generic comparator handling heterogeneous value types; (4) Selection state via React Context + useMemo to avoid context value churn; (5) Full ARIA accessibility: role=grid/row/columnheader, aria-sort, aria-busy, aria-rowcount, aria-label on region and pagination, keyboard activation (Enter/Space) for sortable headers; (6) Pagination UI with a sliding 5-page window clamped to totalPages; (7) Memoization of sorted data, IDs list, and selection context to minimize re-renders. Two generic type parameters flow throughout (TData and TColumn extends string) for type-safe column references. The DataTable const is intersected with its static hook attachments using a type assertion for namespaced consumer access (DataTable.useDataFetch, etc.)."}
